notes: Compressed long-session proxy for antigravity: 4 plain prompts in ONE continuous session (one <conv-id>, transcript.jsonl appended across turns). Single-birth adapter (transcript-first). Per turn: parseUserInput → user_message (ready→working); intermediate assistant_message/function_call_output are non-settling (turn stays working, no within-turn flicker); terminal empty PLANNER_RESPONSE → turn_done (working→ready). No waiting path. Four prompts → ready→working→ready ×4 with clean between-turn edges, never stuck. Plain prompts keep the recording deterministic (no tool-permission stall), mirroring the modern claudecode long-session cell; each turn still has multiple intermediate chunks so the within-turn no-flicker invariant is meaningful. Tokens/cost not in the JSONL → observations assert tokens_nonzero:false, cost_nonzero:false; model omitted (provisional). INTERACTIVE driver (one REPL across all 4 turns). driver=gap:wait_turn — 4× wait_turn needed; record ports wait_turn + the launch_repl session-resolution SEAM first.

text: antigravity session (<conv-id>) appears in ready when transcript.jsonl is written
Turn 1 terminal PLANNER_RESPONSE → ready; within-turn stayed working, never waiting
Turn 4 → ready; final state ready, never stuck across the whole session
